title: Contract Testing Concepts Quiz
description: Test your understanding of API contract testing.

options: Testing that the API returns data quickly
Verifying the API response matches the agreed schema
questions.explanation: Contract testing verifies that the API responses match the agreed-upon schema between frontend and backend teams, ensuring compatibility.
questions.question: What is the main purpose of API contract testing?

questions.explanation: JSON Schema and OpenAPI specifications define the expected structure of API requests and responses, forming the 'contract' between services.
questions.question: What defines the contract between API consumer and provider?

options: Both sides independently verify the contract
Contract tests are run in production
questions.explanation: In contract testing, the provider tests their implementation against contracts (schemas) that represent consumer expectations.
questions.question: How does contract testing typically work?

options: Changes must not break existing consumers
questions.explanation: The key principle is backward compatibility - changes should not break existing consumers. This might mean supporting multiple versions or careful deprecation.
questions.question: What is important when evolving API contracts?
